name: recap-studio
description: Turn a topic or a coding session into a beautiful, dark-mode, mobile-first one-page explainer — one self-contained HTML file you can double-click and read offline in ~5 minutes.

recap-studio-tools.description: Optional local MCP server: artifact store, source cache, diagram render, screenshot, a11y/lighthouse summaries, Vercel preview helper, email draft helper. Side effects gated behind config + confirmation.
